title: Ebullient Mediterranean Lemon Pasta
description: A tangy, caramelized bowtie pasta dish that bursts with Mediterranean flavors and anti-inflammatory ingredients, perfect for a show‑off dinner.
instructions: Cook the bowtie pasta in salted boiling water until al dente, then drain and set aside.
While the pasta cooks, heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and add the minced garlic, cooking until fragrant and lightly golden.
Add the chopped sun‑dried tomatoes to the skillet and sauté for two minutes to release their oils.
Stir in the fresh spinach and cook until wilted, about three minutes.
Pour in the lemon juice and zest, then return the pasta to the skillet, tossing to coat evenly.
Add the toasted pine nuts and grated parmesan, stirring until the cheese melts and creates a silky sauce.
Season the mixture with salt, pepper, and optional crushed red pepper flakes to taste.
Serve immediately, garnishing with extra parmesan if desired.
Enjoy the bright, anti‑inflammatory flavors of this Mediterranean lemon pasta.
